title: Cold-outreach campaign view — TOP 1% community, SPF/DKIM/DMARC visible
html:
The cold outreach platform's campaign sidebar (Leads / Sequences / Schedule / Subsequences) with a 0/50 active count and SPF/DKIM/DMARC status indicators — Yahir's first aeo agency sequence still cold, hadn't sent yet.
